_comment: feature_list.json — Harness Engineering scope tracker. One active feature at a time (WIP=1). Evidence field must be filled before setting status to passing.

features.name: Example Feature Name
features.description: One sentence describing the expected user-facing behavior, not the implementation.

features.name: Second Feature
features.description: Another user-facing behavior. List feat-001 in dependencies if this requires it.

_rules: Only ONE feature can be active at a time (WIP=1).
Evidence field must contain the verification command and output before status moves to passing.
blocked status requires a blocker description added to the feature object.
Status flows one-way: not_started → active → passing. A passing feature is never set back to active.
